nasb.text: And one called out to another and said, “Holy, Holy, Holy, is the Lord of hosts, The whole earth is full of His glory.”

esv.text: And one called to another and said: “Holy, holy, holy is the Lord of hosts; the whole earth is full of his glory!”

cnv.text: 他們彼此高呼著說： “聖哉！聖哉！聖哉！萬軍之耶和華！ 他的榮光充滿全地。”

ccb.text: 他们彼此呼喊： “圣哉，圣哉，圣哉， 万军之耶和华！ 祂的荣耀充满大地。”

csbs.text: 他们彼此呼喊说： “圣哉！圣哉！圣哉！万军之耶和华！ 他的荣耀充满全地。”
